- In **Tulu cinema**, he is the father of director Ilya Khrzhanovsky, and his work includes the film *Dau* (though it is not explicitly stated that he directed it, but he is the father of the director Ilya Khrzhanovsky, who directed *Dau*).

Thus, the film industry in which Ilya Khrzhanovsky would be the director is **Russian cinema**.
